# RFID MFG

> RFID MFG (RFID MFG Co., Ltd.) is a Chinese RFID and smart-card manufacturer established in 1996, offering OEM/ODM production of RFID cards, NFC labels and inlays, RFID tags, RFID-blocking products and IoT hardware. The company runs a 20,000 m² facility with six production lines, holds ISO 9001/14001/45001 plus CE, FCC, FSC, RoHS and REACH, exports to 100+ countries, and provides samples, a 2-year warranty and 24-hour quote turnaround.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Founded: 1996
- Business: RFID & smart-card manufacturing (OEM/ODM)
- Frequencies: LF 125 kHz, HF/NFC 13.56 MHz, UHF 860–960 MHz
- Certifications: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, CE, FCC, FSC, RoHS, REACH
- Contact: peter@rfidmfg.com · +86 755 2376 5843 · WhatsApp +86 158 1550 1857

## Products
- [RFID & NFC Cards](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html#cards): PVC, contact IC, hotel keycards, metal, wooden, eco, epoxy and project-based cards
- [RFID Labels & Stickers](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html#labels): NFC printed labels, dry inlays, wet inlays, white labels
- [RFID Tags](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html#tags): animal, anti-metal, keyfob, wristband and special-purpose tags
- [RFID Blocking](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html#blocking): blocking cards, sleeves and wallets for contactless privacy
- [Hardware](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html#hardware): RFID readers/writers, barcode scan modules, IoT DTU/RTU, smart cabinets
- [Full product catalog](https://www.rfidmfg.com/products.html)
